reference_image.reason: Without it the model invents the subject each generation. Identity will drift across clips.

prompt_structure.template: [SHOT TYPE], [SUBJECT + SIMPLE ACTION], [LIGHT SOURCE], [CAMERA MOVE], [STYLE TAG]
prompt_structure.example: Close up, woman slowly turns toward camera, soft natural window light, static, photorealistic

hard_rules: Do not use vague quality words
Shot type must be first word of prompt
strip_before_sending: Physical descriptions already shown in reference image
Personality adjectives: mysterious, powerful, elegant, confident
Vague quality words: nice, beautiful, dramatic, amazing

failure_modes.fix: Add reference image to every call

failure_modes.cause: Multiple or conflicting camera instructions in prompt
failure_modes.fix: Use exactly one camera_move value from allowed list

failure_modes.cause: Action buried after too much description
failure_modes.fix: Move action earlier — second slot after shot_type

failure_modes.cause: No style tag or conflicting style tags
failure_modes.fix: Pick one style_tag from allowed list, place it last

bad_prompt_pattern: [adjective] [subject] with [physical description] who is [personality trait] doing [action in prose] with [vague lighting] and the camera [passive description]
